labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that POCDD makes hard or impossible today? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What should change? Which command, sub-skill, or part of the methodology? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches, and why this one. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Affects a `/poc` command (`skills/pocdd/<cmd>/`)
- [ ] Affects the methodology (`spec/POCDD.md` + `shared/conventions.md`)
- [ ] Affects repo infrastructure (docs, CI, scripts)
